arts.ttl: FA Cup quarter-final draw in full as Aston Villa and Man City opponents confirmed
arts.sum: With Brighton through at Newcastle United's expense, have just two games remaining with Man Unied taking on Fulham before Forest host Ipswich tomorrow night (7:30pm kick-off). FA Cup fourth round results

arts.ttl: Named after Van Basten & master of success - Asensio shining at Villa
arts.sum: Marco Asensio has won the Champions League three times and multiple other trophies at Real Madrid and Paris St-Germain but now he is looking to add more silverware with Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Manchester City draw Bournemouth as Preston host Villa in FA Cup quarter-finals
arts.sum: With Pep Guardiola’s men the last top six Premier League side standing the FA Cup is wide open this season

arts.ttl: FA Cup quarter-final draw in full: Manchester City, Aston Villa, Fulham discover last-eight opponents
arts.sum: Manchester City are handed an away tie in the FA Cup quarter-finals, while Fulham discover who they will play after edging out Manchester United on Sunday.

arts.ttl: FA Cup quarter-finals: Bournemouth to face Man City, Preston to host Villa
arts.sum: In-form Bournemouth are drawn at home to Manchester City in the FA Cup quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: FA Cup quarter-final draw IN FULL as Man City and Aston Villa discover opponents
arts.sum: Manchester City, Aston Villa and Championship side Preston North End have all learned what awaits them in the FA Cup quarter-final after earning their places with fifth round success

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news as Jhon Duran replacement identified ahead of summer window
arts.sum: Aston Villa transfer news from BirminghamLive as Unai Emery linked with interest in teenage Greek duo making names for themselves at Olympiacos Aston Villa have been linked with interest in two of Olympiacos’ exciting teenagers ahead of the summer transfer window – one of whom is seen as a potential replacement for Jhon Duran.
